title: pyrus obtusifolia
intro: Pyrus obtusifolia, also known as the Korean mountain apple, is a species of deciduous tree native to mountainous regions of Korea and China. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus obtusifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and improve digestion. Pyrus obtusifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
